evidence: "It's a film that deserves a cover that reflects its vibe."
"The only thing preventing me from giving this one five stars is that the script could have been way more interesting."
"It's hilarious. I can't remember the last time I almost cried laughing during a movie."
"The low budget is often distractingly apparent, and some of the acting isn't good."
"I had to stop due to the annoying stuttering playback on the DVD."
"It's obvious they didn't have any confidence in it, which is a shame, because it's easily the best TV show they've produced."
"If you're a fan of any of David Wain's work, you'll like Wainy Days, plain and simple."
"Stuart Gordon is the only horror director that can make me cringe."
"It's insane that I am writing the second review for this movie. It has everything you could want in a ninja movie."
"This movie spoke to me deeply. Lots of parallels in our lives."
"There are beautiful moments from this first (and final) season that'll stick with me forever."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and comedies, particularly those that evoke deep emotional responses. They are sensitive to production quality and have a notable loyalty to specific creators like David Wain and Stuart Gordon, indicating a taste for unique and creative storytelling.
